issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete. Missing required parameters: 'count' (should specify looking at 5 cards), 'filter' must specify {Supernovas} type AND exclude [Monkey.D.Luffy], and 'optional' should be true (up to 1). Current filter is 'Any' which matches nothing in the effect text.

Effect does not capture the full sequence: (1) look at 5 cards from top, (2) reveal up to 1 matching card and add to hand, (3) place rest at bottom in any order. The DSL only represents the search portion and omits the deck reorganization step.
